title: Testing
description: Test CReact apps by rendering them against an in-memory Memory backend and asserting on real handler outputs.
rendering_intro: Give <0>render</0> an in-memory Memory backend and a stack name, then await <1>result.ready</1> to let every handler settle before you assert.
rendering_outputs: Read the deployed instances with <0>getNodes()</0> and check their <1>outputs</1>. Because handlers run for real, use Vitest's <0>vi.waitFor</0> when an output changes over time.
tip_reset_runtime: Call <0>resetRuntime()</0> and <1>result.dispose()</1> in an afterEach hook so runtime state and intervals never leak between tests.
mocking_intro: Handlers call the same globals your app does, so replace them at the boundary. Stub <0>fetch</0> with <1>vi.stubGlobal</1> to drive a component through a scripted sequence of responses.
mocking_transitions: Feed the stub a script, render the component, and assert the status transitions it reports. Restore the stub with <0>vi.unstubAllGlobals</0> after each test.
in_the_wild: See these patterns cover a full status page in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0>.
